name: Quinoa Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Water, simmer for about 20 minutes or until all water is absorbed
1 Cup dried apples, chopped (or substitute with any dried fruit)
1/2 Cup dried apricots, chopped (or 1-2 fresh peaches or nectarines, chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the quinoa and bring it to a simmer in 2 cups of water for about 20 minutes or until all water is absorbed.
2. Add apple juice, dates, dried apples, dried apricots, and cinnamon to the cooked quinoa. Stir well.
3. Cook for about 10 minutes until heated through.
4. Chill the mixture before serving.
5. Experiment with different juices and additional dried or fresh fruits for flavor variations.
6. Adjust the recipe by halving if desired portion size is too large.
This dish provides a delicious way to incorporate alternative grains into your diet, making it both nutritious and satisfying.
